entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00199) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00199 TO IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO INCREASE THE CEILING AMOUNT FOR SUBCLIN 7027E.
THE FUNDING FOR THIS EFFORT WILL BE PROVIDED VIA MODIFICATION P00007 TO THE TASK ORDER HSTS01-16-J-HRM094.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00200) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00201) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00201 TO THE IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS:
14A. ADD AND EXERCISE SUBCLIN 8026C "MAP HQ CONTINUED PHASE 2 ACTIVITIES" IN THE AMOUNT OF $294,464.12 14B. INCREASE THE CEILING ON CLIN 7029 FROM $221,964.00 BY $101,272.00 TO $323,236.00.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00205) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00205 TO THE IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS:
14A. TO ADD AND EXERCISE SUBCLIN 7036A "PHASE 1: PLANNING, ANALYSIS, DEVELOP TRAINING MATERIALS&CCC" IN THE AMOUNT OF $133,303.00. 14B. TO ADD AND EXERCISE SUBCLIN 7036B "PHASE 2: TEST TSA TECHNOLOGY" IN THE AMOUNT OF $419.52. 14C. TO ADD AND EXERCISE SUBCLIN 7036C "PHASE 3: KNOWLEDGE TRANSFER" IN THE AMOUNT OF $122,488.77. 14D. TO ADD AND EXERCISE SUBCLIN 7036CA "PHASE 3 TRAVEL" IN THE AMOUNT OF $12,907.26.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00206) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00206 TO THE IDIQ CONTRACT HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS AS FOLLOWS: 14A. TO ADD AND EXERCISE SUBCLIN 8003AF "COMPUTER BASED TESTING (TSO) - MOBILES" IN THE AMOUNT OF $21,006.48. 14B. SUBCLIN 8003AF INCLUDES THE MOBILE CBTS FOR THE GTF, ISN, AND BIS AIRPORTS ON THE 7TH, 8TH, AND 9TH OF JULY, 2016, RESPECTIVELY. 14C. A NOTICE TO PROCEED FOR THE REFERENCED THREE MOBILE CBT EVENTS WAS GIVEN TO LOCKHEED MARTIN BY THE CONTRACTING OFFICER ON JUNE 28, 2016.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
